source_issue.title: a11y - Icon for toolbar button "user" - cms ui

summary_markdown:
```markdown
## What this issue is about
This issue discusses improving accessibility (a11y) in the Plone CMS UI by updating the icon and text for the "user" toolbar button. The goal is to provide a more intuitive and user-friendly experience for authenticated users.

## What needs to be done
1. **Change the text** for the button from "username" to "Settings".
2. **Update the icon** to a settings icon, choosing between:
   - [Volto settings icon](https://github.com/plone/volto/blob/master/src/icons/settings.svg)
   - [Bootstrap settings slider icon](https://icons.getbootstrap.com/icons/sliders/)
   - [Bootstrap vertical sliders icon](https://icons.getbootstrap.com/icons/sliders2-vertical/)

## Helpful background
The issue is part of a larger discussion about long-term UI improvements in Plone. There are considerations for future enhancements, such as creating a dedicated "Site Settings" menu item, but those details are not final yet.

## Good first steps
1. Review the [Contributing to Plone](https://6.docs.plone.org/contributing/index.html) guidelines and [First-time contributors](https://6.docs.plone.org/contributing/first-time.html) documentation.
2. Set up your local environment by installing Plone for development, as mentioned in the [installation instructions](https://6.docs.plone.org/install/install-from-packages.html).
3. Explore the relevant code files to identify where the changes are needed. Don’t hesitate to ask for help if you're unsure where to start!
```
